reviews.comment:
Fuimos de noche y nos atendió un señor muy amable buena atención

(Translated by Google)
We went at night and were served by a very kind gentleman, good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xoclFXRk9VMnRFV1hwWmNXSXhjbnBVTlRsR2NYYxAB

reviews.comment:
Lugar sencillo buena atencion, amplio parque para pasar un buen momento en paz con la naturaleza.  Tiene Un pequeño bar un poco caro. Lo elijo tambien por quedarme a tiro para cargar nafta que ya queda poca saliendo.desde CABA. Además tengo descuento por ser socio de ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Simple place, good service, large park to spend a pleasant time in peace surrounded by nature. It has a small bar that's a bit pricey. I also choose it because it's convenient for filling up with gas, which is becoming scarce when leaving Buenos Aires. Plus, I get a discount for being an ACA member.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25wRVExWkdWVVpEV0ZVd09IVnJVMlJGVG1WUVRHYxAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena zona de descanso

(Translated by Google)
Very good rest area
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21wVllrWnViREp2WW5NMFJqQmtOMlptVVdaYVVrRRAB

reviews.comment:
La señora que atiende el shop es adorable! Súper atenta nos encanta parar en esta estación aunque tengamos que desviarnos un poquito

(Translated by Google)
The lady who works at the shop is lovely! She's super attentive, and we love stopping at this station even though it means a slight detour.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2paTFpXZ3laVXhTZG5WNU9YbGZOWEJzT1doSGMzYxAB

reviews.comment:
Es la parada ideal cuando vas de Buenos Aires a Córdoba. Entras en Amstrong 2 km , seguis por la 9 vieja y te encontras con la estación del ACA. Ahí pasamos la noche , un lugar súper tranquilo y seguro. Nos encantó , muchas gracias automóvil club de tortugas.

(Translated by Google)
It's the perfect stop when you're traveling from Buenos Aires to Córdoba. Enter Armstrong, go 2 km, continue on the old Route 9, and you'll find the ACA station. We spent the night there; it's a super quiet and safe place. We loved it, thank you so much, Automóvil Club de Tortugas!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tScU5rdzBkWGR1VVVkTGVWUnVlVGg1YzFjeVVWRRAB

reviews.comment:
Otro año mas eligiendo este parador y no defrauda nunca.
Es un excelente parador para ir con niños y estar tranquilos.
El personal es muy cordial, tanto los del market como los playeros.
Los baños están siempre impecables y con olor a perfume.

(Translated by Google)
Another year choosing this Parador and it never disappoints.
It's an excellent place to go with children and relax.
The staff is very friendly, both those in the market and those on the beach.
The restrooms are always spotless and smell of fresh perfume.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias Gastón por su puntuación y por elegirnos nuevamente.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURiNXJTMktnEAE

reviews.comment:
Lugar ideal para hacer una parada en el camino a Córdoba. Hay mesas al aire libre, árboles y pajaritos cantando. Hay una cafetería pequeña.

(Translated by Google)
An ideal place to stop on the way to Córdoba. There are outdoor tables, trees, and birds singing. There's also a small café.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2toYVJtUjRjbVJWUzIxTGNsZG5WVFp1YkRWc1kxRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Don't miss the shop. It's not fully stocked, but I guarantee you'll leave with a smile and a lot of nostalgia.
